info.title: Bitly API
info.description: Bitly API v4 for link management, URL shortening, QR codes, campaigns, and analytics.

post.description: Converts a long URL to a Bitlink.
Converts a long URL to a Bitlink and sets additional parameters.

get.description: Returns information for the specified link.

patch.description: Updates fields in the specified link.

post.description: Returns the short link and long URL for the specified link.

get.description: Returns the click counts for the specified link in an array.

get.summary: Get clicks summary for a Bitlink
get.description: Returns the click counts rolled up into a single field.

get.summary: Get metrics by country for a Bitlink
get.description: Returns the country origins of click traffic.

get.summary: Get metrics by city for a Bitlink
get.description: Returns the city origins of click traffic.

get.summary: Get metrics by device type for a Bitlink
get.description: Returns the device types generating click traffic.

get.summary: Get metrics by referrers for a Bitlink
Get metrics by referring domains for a Bitlink
get.description: Returns the referring domain click counts.

get.summary: Get engagement counts for a Bitlink
get.description: Returns engagement counts including button clicks, clicks, and scans.

get.summary: Get engagement summary for a Bitlink
get.description: Returns engagement counts rolled into a single field.
Returns a paginated collection of Bitlinks for a group.

patch.description: Bulk update can add/remove tags or archive up to 100 links.

get.summary: Retrieve sorted Bitlinks for a group
get.description: Returns a list of Bitlinks sorted by the specified metric.
Returns the campaigns for the current authenticated user.

post.description: Add a keyword (custom back-half) to a Bitlink.

get.summary: Get clicks for a custom Bitlink

get.description: Returns a list of groups in the organization.

get.summary: Retrieve shorten counts for a group
Get click metrics by country for a group
Get shorten counts for an organization
Get plan limits for an organization

post.description: Create a new QR Code and return its metadata.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth2 access token or API key as Bearer token.

Units.name: units
Units.description: Number of time units; -1 returns all available data.

UnitReference.name: unit_reference
UnitReference.description: ISO-8601 timestamp for the reference point of the time range.
